title: Registry collection entry
description: One file per collection at collection/<letter>/<ns>/<name>.json, where <letter> is the first character of <ns>. A pointer to one or more published versions of a Bruno/OpenCollection. Each version is independently sourced (git or url) — adding a version is a PR that appends to `versions`. The registry stores no usage stats; install counts come from a separate public API.

ns.description: Publisher / namespace. Must match the <ns> folder; its first char is the <letter> shard.

name.description: Collection name. Must match the <name> filename.

title.description: Display title shown in search and on the detail page.

tagline.description: One sentence shown under the title in search.

color.description: Optional accent color (hex) for the listing.

verified.description: EDITORIAL — set by maintainers during review. Omit when submitting.

official.description: EDITORIAL — set by maintainers during review. Omit when submitting.

featured.description: EDITORIAL — set by maintainers during review. Omit when submitting.

trending.description: EDITORIAL — set by maintainers during review. Omit when submitting.

versions.description: Every published version, newest or oldest order doesn't matter (latest is derived by semver). Add one entry per version via PR; `type` may differ across versions (e.g. v1.0 from git, v1.1 from url).

version.description: Manual version label, e.g. "1.0" or "2.1.3". Compared as semver to pick the latest.

type.description: How `source` is resolved: clone a git repo, or download a hosted artifact.

source.description: Locator for this version's opencollection artifact. Shape depends on `type` (see allOf).

hash.description: Optional SHA-256 of the resolved opencollection artifact, SRI-style "sha256-<base64>". Verified client-side after download.

ref.description: Tag, branch or commit to check out (defaults to the repo's default branch).

subdir.description: Path within the repo where the collection lives, if not the root.

url.description: Direct download URL of the opencollection artifact (any host).
